title: EP-PROVENANCE-CHAIN-v1 — Chained Provenance Receipt
description: SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0. Experimental additive composite over EP-RECEIPT-v1 (PIP-001 Core is frozen and NOT modified). Bundles a root human signoff (EP-RECEIPT-v1) -> an ordered, scope-narrowing delegation chain (DRP references) -> a per-action approval (EP-RECEIPT-v1) -> an execution reference; plus optional scoped agent_identity claim and a named-owner liability attestation. Verifying the composite = verify each linked v1 receipt + check chain/scope-containment, with NO new trust. This schema validates SHAPE only; security obligations are enforced by verifyProvenanceOffline() (see EP-PROVENANCE-RECEIPT-SPEC.md).

root_signoff.description: Root of authority: a full EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipt whose human signoff anchors the bundle. Verified verbatim by verifyTrustReceipt().

delegation_chain.description: Ordered root->leaf delegation chain. Each child MUST be scope-contained within its parent. MAY be empty.

action_approval.description: Per-action approval: a full EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipt authorizing the exact executed action. REQUIRED at verify time when execution.irreversible is true.

provenance_metadata.description: Untrusted metadata. Never part of a security decision.

receipt.description: A full EP-RECEIPT-v1 §6.2 receipt. Shape is intentionally open here (its own schema is the I-D); verifyTrustReceipt() is the source of truth.

verification.description: Portable verification hints only. A relying party MUST pin equivalent roots out of band; these bytes never establish their own authority.

approver_keys.description: Map of approver_key_id -> pinned key entry.

log_public_key.description: Trusted log Ed25519 public key (base64url SPKI DER).

rp_id.description: WebAuthn relying-party identifier pinned by the verifier.

allowed_origins.description: Exact WebAuthn origin allowlist pinned by the verifier.

human_key_classes.description: Which key_class values count as a human signoff for THIS receipt. Default verifier requires Class A (WebAuthn UV).

signedAttestation.description: An optional offline-verifiable signature over canonical bytes. Evidence, not a trust anchor.

delegationLink.description: One DRP delegation reference. Field names mirror lib/delegation.js (delegator<-principal_id, delegatee<-agent_entity_id, scope, max_value_usd, expires_at, constraints).

delegatee.description: Recipient of authority: an ep:agent:/ep:entity: id.

scope.description: Granted action types. '*' or 'x.*' globs permitted.

max_value_usd.description: Optional value cap. null inherits the parent cap (NOT 'uncapped').

parent_ref.description: Binds this link to its parent. sequence 0 MUST name a root_signoff approver/approver_key_id; later links name the prior delegatee.

action_hash.description: MUST equal action_approval.receipt.action_hash (the per-action approval authorized THIS execution).

irreversible.description: When true, a valid action_approval binding a human signoff is REQUIRED (fail-closed).

agentIdentity.description: OPTIONAL. Agent identity is a SCOPED CLAIM, identified and attestable, never proof of strong agent identity. Reported by the verifier, never trusted as identity proof.

liability.description: OPTIONAL. Assigns a NAMED owner accepting accountability. EVIDENCE, not a legal determination. The verifier reports the owner and checks any signature; it never adjudicates liability.
